final:
module top_module(
    input INVALID_A,
    input B,
    input CIN,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output COUT,
    output SUM
);// Implementing full adder using behavioral modeling
    assign SUM = INVALID_A ^ B ^ CIN;
    assign COUT = (INVALID_A & B) | (B & CIN) | (INVALID_A & CIN);
    
endmodule
